title: Novel Object Recognition Test
steps: Individualize each mouse in a different cage with new bedding.
Expose the animal to two identical objects for habituation.
After 24h change one of the two objects for a new one.
Measure the time the animal spends exploring the new object and the oldobject.
Calculate the discrimination index using the formula: [time exploring thenew object-time exploring the familiar object]/total time).
creator: Miquel Vila
